stemHtml: An aeroplane climbs to cruising level with a constant pitch attitude and maximum climb thrust (assume no supercharger). How do the following variables change during the climb? (gamma = flight path angle)

options.a: Gamma decreases, angle of attack increases, IAS decreases.
options.b: Gamma remains constant, angle of attack remains constant, IAS decreases.
options.c: Gamma decreases, angle of attack increases, IAS remains constant.
options.d: Gamma decreases, angle of attack remains constant, IAS decreases.
